story.iWant: the application to remember my window position, sidebar state, and preferences
story.soThat: my workspace layout persists across sessions
story.tasks: - Create StateStore service with electron-store - Implement window state persistence (position, size, maximized) - Implement sidebar state persistence (collapsed, width, expanded sections) - Implement user preferences persistence (theme, fontSize, lastActive) - Implement state versioning and migration system - Add state export/import utilities (optional)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Window opens at last position and size (CORE §9.1)
Last active project/thread restored on app launch (CORE §9.2)
Old state formats automatically migrated to new versions (CORE §9.4)
Corrupt state handled gracefully (reset to defaults, log error)
Multi-monitor changes handled (window stays visible on available screens)
State changes debounced to avoid excessive disk writes

doc.title: Epic 4 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Application state persistence. Inputs: State updates (window, sidebar, prefs). Outputs: Persisted state, restored on launch. Owner: Main Process. Uses electron-store (JSON file storage).

doc.title: Epic 4 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: interface StateSchema {version, window: {x, y, width, height, maximized, displayBounds}, sidebar: {collapsed, width, expandedSections}, preferences: {theme, fontSize, defaultModel, notifications, lastActive}}

doc.title: Epic 4 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Install electron-store, create StateStore wrapper, define StateSchema, implement get/set/delete, create WindowStateManager, listen for window resize/move (debounced 500ms), save/restore state, handle multi-monitor, implement migrations.

doc.title: Epic 4 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: State read operations: < 5ms (in-memory cache). State write operations: < 50ms (debounced, written to disk). Window resize/move debounce delay: 500ms (prevent excessive writes).

artifact.reason: NEW - Main process state management using electron-store wrapper
NEW - Window position/size tracking with debounce
NEW - Renderer sidebar state (synced with StateStore)

story-context.constraints: - **Desktop Implementation:** Electron main process. State stored in JSON file via electron-store. - **File Location:** ~/.config/holokai-desktop/config.json (Linux/Mac) or %APPDATA%\holokai-desktop\config.json (Windows). - **Debouncing:** Window resize/move events debounced (500ms delay). Preferences saved immediately (infrequent changes). - **Multi-Monitor:** Check if saved {x, y} within any display bounds. If offscreen, center on primary display. - **State Migration:** Version field in state. On load, check version, run migrations sequentially (v1→v2→v3→current). - **Error Handling:** Corrupt state file → reset to defaults, log error, don't crash. JSON parse errors caught gracefully. - **Security:** State file encrypted using Electron safeStorage API. Permissions: read/write for current user only (chmod 600).

interface.name: StateStore.get()
interface.signature: get<K extends keyof StateSchema>(key: K): StateSchema[K] | undefined - Type-safe state getter

interface.name: StateStore.set()
interface.signature: set<K extends keyof StateSchema>(key: K, value: StateSchema[K]): void - Type-safe state setter, writes to disk

interface.name: StateStore.migrate()
interface.signature: migrate(fromVersion: number, toVersion: number): void - Runs migration functions sequentially, updates version field

interface.name: WindowStateManager.saveWindowState()
interface.signature: saveWindowState(bounds: {x, y, width, height}, maximized: boolean): void - Debounced (500ms), saves window state to StateStore

tests.standards: Use vitest for unit tests. Test get/set/delete operations. Test debounce logic (verify save delayed by 500ms). Test migration functions (v1→v2, v2→v3). Test corrupt state handling (reset to defaults). Test multi-monitor fallback (offscreen position → center on primary).

test.idea: Integration test: Resize window to 1200x800, move to (100, 100), restart app, verify window at same position/size
Integration test: Collapse sidebar, restart app, verify sidebar still collapsed
Integration test: Set theme to 'dark', restart app, verify dark theme applied on startup
Integration test: View thread ID 'abc123', restart app, verify thread ID stored in lastActive
Unit test: Seed v1 state {version: 1, window: {...}}, start app, verify migrated to v2 {version: 2, window: {...}, newField: default}
Unit test: Corrupt config.json (invalid JSON), start app, verify state reset to defaults, app doesn't crash
Integration test: Save position on secondary monitor (x=2000), disconnect monitor, restart, verify window centered on primary monitor
Unit test: Trigger 10 window resize events in 100ms, verify only 1 save after 500ms debounce
